practice.name: Problem 9 (2017 AIME II)
practice.statement: This is a 2017 AIME II problem focusing on recursion and combinatorics. See the full problem statement on [AoPS](https://artofproblemsolving.com/wiki/index.php/2017_AIME_II_Problems/Problem_9).

practice.name: Problem 11 (2018 AIME I)
practice.statement: This is a 2018 AIME I problem focusing on bijections in combinatorics. See the full problem statement on [AoPS](https://artofproblemsolving.com/wiki/index.php/2018_AIME_I_Problems/Problem_11).
